on your forehand, your backhand, your serve, years in the gym. For us
mere mortals, that’s probably not going to happen. The interesting
thing about the pros is it's not just their physical abilities that set them

because everything is going on upstairs.

because thinking that thought process that only takes understanding. It

strategies and all these tactics and I take them even deeper and make
it just a lot more actionable for you." That will be your typical
transition and that way it's what I call soft landing, so that way when
they get to your sales video or your sales letter, it isn't like, "Wow.
You've been given me all this great stuff then I'll assume you're asking
me for money." You did one a little bit of a transition there. Will with a
very explicit transition here, most of the time it's going to be less
explicit than this.
In any case, that’s Will's pre-launch. Again, he did great -$168,000.
It's easy to see why he had just really great videos. That first video just
knocked it out of the park. The second video didn’t love the open so
much but it was a very strong content and very strong close.
This video number three and four are both powerful. Both had really
strong opens and really strong closes and some good strong teaching
in between.
